---
title: "NFL Shiny App"
subtitle: "Embedded App for DANL 310"
date: 2026-04-29
format: html
---

Replace `YOUR_SHINY_APP_URL` below with your Posit Connect Cloud app URL.

```{=html}
<div style="text-align: center; margin: 1em 0;">
  <iframe
    src="YOUR_SHINY_APP_URL"
    style="width: 100%; max-width: 1100px; height: 850px; border: none;"
  ></iframe>
</div>
```
